title: Back mod
description: Teleports you back to the point where you died.
body:
This mod adds a new /back command to everyone to type and use in the chat.

What does it do? When you die instead of walking to the point where you died, you type "/back" in the chat and it  instantly teleports you back where you died.

This is extremely useful and fun for friends who play together in a server!
or in a singleworld thats okay too.
